g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the input format for Swin Transformer V2?')
sendPrompt('What does patch partition and linear embedding do in Swin V2?')
sendPrompt('Describe Stage 1 of Swin Transformer V2 in detail')
g.text: ✦ V2: Log-CPB position bias · cosine attention · res-post-norm in every block

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does patch merging work in Swin Transformer?')
sendPrompt('Describe Stage 2 of Swin Transformer V2')
g.text: W-MSA block + SW-MSA block · Log-CPB · cosine attn · res-post-norm

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does patch merging work in Swin Transformer?')
sendPrompt('Describe Stage 3 of Swin Transformer V2')
g.text: Alternating W-MSA / SW-MSA · Log-CPB · cosine attn · res-post-norm

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does patch merging work in Swin Transformer?')
sendPrompt('Describe Stage 4 of Swin Transformer V2')
g.text: W-MSA block + SW-MSA block · Log-CPB · cosine attn · res-post-norm

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the classification head of Swin Transformer V2?')
sendPrompt('What class labels does Swin V2 output?')

svg.text: ✦ Log-CPB (log-spaced continuous position bias) — resolution-transferable attention
✦ Cosine attention — replaces dot-product; no temperature overflow at scale
✦ Res-post-norm — LayerNorm after residual add for stable very-deep training
